title: 2026 GRAMMYS Nominations: Best New Artist Nominees
text: Olivia Dean won the Best New Artist Grammy at the 2026 Grammys held on February 1, 2026. The eight nominees in this category were Olivia Dean (winner), KATSEYE, The Marías, Addison Rae, sombr, Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, and Lola Young. According to the article, the Best New Artist category shines a spotlight on emerging talent who are defining music's zeitgeist. The nominees were recognized for their unique artistry and the impact they've created on the music industry during the eligibility year. Dean's win came after an emotional acceptance speech where she acknowledged being the granddaughter of an immigrant and spoke about celebrating immigrants.
